plugins.description: Full skill collection: domain skills (claude-api, noir, solidity-auditor, ethskills, raxol, nix, native-code, ffmpeg-asm, droo-stack, blockscout, coingecko, cancer-predisposition-variant-analyst), workflow skills (tdd, code-review, prd-to-plan, focused-fix, release, qa, interface-designer, ubiquitous-language, design-ux, writing-voice, humanize, property-testing, refactoring-strategy), infrastructure skills (mcp-server-builder, ci-cd-pipeline-builder, dependency-auditor, observability-designer, database-designer, performance-profiler, git-guardrails, git-worktree-manager, env-secrets-manager, tech-debt-tracker, security-auditor, web-asset-generator, playwright, prepper), meta skills (polymath, architect, agent-designer, adversarial-reviewer, self-improving-agent, codebase-onboarding, rag-architect, llm-cost-optimizer, skill-creator), agent skills (digest, recall, autoresearch, watchdog, sentinel, patchbot, scribe)
